flows: Voice AEP creation — Scenario step with live visualization
Voice AEP test and refine (Step 3 of 3)
Vishing campaign wizard (8.5 steps including OSINT review)

Voice AEP Builder: Step 1 — Persona (caller name, claimed role, greeting, voice, tone, banned phrases)
Step 2 — Scenario (phases, collectibles, tactics, goals, live visualization)
Step 3 — Test & Refine (live test call, Scenario Flow replay)

persona_fields: Background Audio (Office / Lobby / Road noise / None)
scenario_fields: Tactics (name, phase, intent, templates, repeatable toggle)
voice_aep_architecture.scenario_visualization: Live call flow diagram: phase nodes with tactic chips, transition arrows with conditions, collectibles legend, goal summary at terminal node. Read-only during editing. Export as PNG. Updates after test calls to show phases reached and collectibles triggered.

facts_system.description: Tenant-level OSINT data injected into the AI caller at runtime. Stored per-organization, versioned separately from AEPs. Reviewed in campaign wizard Step 3.5.
fact_categories: Org chart (CISO, head of finance, executives)
admin_actions_per_fact: Flag (sends correction request to Dune data team)

key_fields: Call Window (start time, end time, timezone)
integrations: AEP Library (Voice AEPs — Persona + Scenario versioned separately)
open_questions_flagged: Does call recording require a separate VOIP provider configuration?
Risk pipeline integration — are vishing outcomes isolated from risk scoring in v1?
What is the SLA for Dune operator campaign activation after submission?
IDP SCIM timezone data — is per-target local timezone call window enforcement feasible in v1?
Two-party consent jurisdiction enforcement — auto-detect or admin self-certify?
How is the facts database populated for new customers (onboarding flow vs. Dune-side tool)?
Is fact suppression per-campaign (must re-review each time) or persistent across campaigns?
How does the VOIP system match facts to phases at runtime (relevant_phases field)?
Who is responsible for keeping facts accurate — Dune OSINT refresh or admin-managed?
confidence_notes: No Figma designs exist yet. PRD updated 2026-06-10 to reflect actual backend data model from /Users/aadi/Downloads/data. Voice AEP architecture (Persona + Scenario + Facts) now matches production YAML structure. Open questions remain around facts population, suppression persistence, and compliance enforcement mechanics.
